channel.title: European Property Law Journal
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in European Property Law Journal

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Björn Hoops, Elisabeth Ahlinder, Jakub Bryła, Rosa Maria Garcia Teruel, Christine Godt, Anais Guerry, Bonnie Holligan, Tomasz Janocha, Jean-François Joye, Jacco Karens, Víðir Smári Petersen, Sabrina Praduroux, Hector Simón Moreno, Flora Vern, Johan Van de Voorde, Rachael Walsh, Franciszek Zowczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eplj-2024-frontmatter3

item.title: A final editorial: comparative legal analysis v. comparative theory?
item.description: Article by Björn Hoops, Elisabeth Ahlinder, Jakub Bryła, Rosa Maria Garcia Teruel, Christine Godt, Anais Guerry, Bonnie Holligan, Tomasz Janocha, Jean-François Joye, Jacco Karens, Víðir Smári Petersen, Sabrina Praduroux, Hector Simón Moreno, Flora Vern, Johan Van de Voorde, Rachael Walsh, Franciszek Zowczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eplj-2024-0014

item.title: Equality Rights and Unequal Property Rights in Multi-owned Buildings
item.description: Article by Björn Hoops, Elisabeth Ahlinder, Jakub Bryła, Rosa Maria Garcia Teruel, Christine Godt, Anais Guerry, Bonnie Holligan, Tomasz Janocha, Jean-François Joye, Jacco Karens, Víðir Smári Petersen, Sabrina Praduroux, Hector Simón Moreno, Flora Vern, Johan Van de Voorde, Rachael Walsh, Franciszek Zowczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eplj-2024-0015

item.title: Positive Obligations to Retrofit Buildings with Third-Party Effect under Private Law as an Instrument of Public Climate Policy
item.description: Article by Björn Hoops, Elisabeth Ahlinder, Jakub Bryła, Rosa Maria Garcia Teruel, Christine Godt, Anais Guerry, Bonnie Holligan, Tomasz Janocha, Jean-François Joye, Jacco Karens, Víðir Smári Petersen, Sabrina Praduroux, Hector Simón Moreno, Flora Vern, Johan Van de Voorde, Rachael Walsh, Franciszek Zowczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eplj-2024-0016
